summary: Build W13 — goal locked Tier C sub-21:30 off the 7-13 TT 23:23 (Adj #164). MID-WEEK CHANGE 7-15: exercise HR RETIRED as session governor (Adj #175) — all run/row intensity is pace + RPE only, watch HR display-only; paces recalculated off the TT (Adj #176): easy raised to 9:15-10:30, M 8:20-8:30, T holds 7:50-7:55 RPE ≤7, I holds 7:10-7:25 RPE 9. Wednesday's T banked clean via treadmill sub for AQI 128 — 4x6 @ 7:56 set pace, RPE 7 across, §11.C green, 6th straight T at RPE ≤7 (Adj #177); future treadmill quality at 1%. Friday = first VO2max session of the cycle. Saturday: row 80 bump; calf 355 AM-gated. Open item: two spare calendar weeks before race day 10-24 — decide by the W14 test (Adj #167).

days.note: Logged — 23:23 @ 7:32/mi avg, road, 85°F, fed, Vomero Plus; HR 189 avg / 193 peak (MHR relock 193, Adj #165); cadence 173; full WU incl. 4x20 s strides; no pain anywhere. TIER C LOCKED — sub-21:30 (Adj #164). T holds 7:50-7:55 (Adj #166).

days.session: Hyp A — incline 150 debut + Build scheme
days.note: Logged — incline 150×5 RIR 3 BUMP LANDED + AMRAP 135×12 (e1RM ~189, TM 168 stands) → 155 next Tue (Adj #168); preacher 70 LANDED 10/10/10/8 (Adj #170); DB lat 30 hold, tightest mid-block (Adj #169); pushdown 25 hold, set 3 best-yet 11 (Adj #171); crunch +10 10/10/6 rebuild continues (Adj #172); rear-delt opener drifted RIR 4 — hold (Adj #173). Fed; SI + all tendons clean AM/during/post; elbow clean 4th straight.

Logged — treadmill sub for AQI 128 (0% incline): 4x6 min @ 7:56 set pace, 90 s rec, RPE 7 across = 6th straight T at RPE ≤7 (Adj #166/#177); §11.C green; fed; SI + tendons clean AM/during/post; HR display-only 168-184 (Adj #175). Future treadmill quality at 1% (Adj #177).

days.note: I pace 7:10-7:25 (Adj #166) — start at the slow end, RPE 9 anchor; pace + RPE only, ignore watch HR (Adj #175). First I-pace work; treadmill 1% or road.

days.note: Long run at the new easy band 9:15-10:30, conversation-gated (Adj #176). Bumps: chest-supp row 75→80 (Adj #156); seated calf 345→355 gated on a clean lift-day AM Achilles read (Adj #160). Holds/rebuilds: lat 165 (Adj #155), DB lat 35 in-band (Adj #157), preacher 60 (Adj #158), pushdown 25 (Adj #159/#171), crunch +10 to 3×10 (Adj #161), chest fly rested re-read (Adj #162).
